title: Onboarding - Screens in dark mode
scenario: Verify all onboarding screens display correctly in dark mode when the phone is set to dark mode, matching Figma specifications.
steps: 1. Set the phone to dark mode via system settings.
4. Verify that all elements, images, and colors are displayed correctly.
5. Compare the actual display against the Figma specification for dark mode.
expected: All onboarding screens display correctly in dark mode. All elements, images, and colors match the Figma specification.
